violations.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
violations.help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

violations.description: Ensure every HTML document has a lang attribute
violations.help: <html> element must have a lang attribute

violations.description: Ensure the contentinfo landmark is at top level
violations.help: Contentinfo landmark should not be contained in another landmark

violations.description: Ensure <meta name="viewport"> does not disable text scaling and zooming
violations.help: Zooming and scaling must not be disabled

violations.description: Ensure that the page, or at least one of its frames contains a level-one heading
violations.help: Page should contain a level-one heading
